2606.09105.title: Graph2Idea:Retrieval-Augmented Scientific Idea Generation with Graph-Structured Contexts
2606.09105.paper_summary: Generating novel, feasible, and high-quality research ideas is an important yet challenging task in scientific discovery.Recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based methods often ground idea generation with retrieved literature, but the retrieved evidence is usually provided as flat text, such as titles, abstracts, or summaries. Such flat contexts may contain redundant or weakly relevant information, while making cross-paper relations among problems, methods, mechanisms, and findings difficult to identify and trace.To address this challenge, we propose Graph2Idea, a knowledge graph-guided framework for retrieval-augmented scientific idea generation.Graph2Idea first retrieves papers according to the input topic, transforms them into structured knowledge triples, and dynamically constructs a target-centered knowledge graph to make literature relations explicit.It then extracts compact graph-derived contexts that retain target-relevant relational evidence while reducing noisy textual input.Based on these contexts, a two-stage generation process first identifies promising research directions and then guides the LLM to synthesize candidate ideas from graph-grounded evidence.Experiments on a scientific idea generation benchmark show that Graph2Idea outperforms representative baselines under the automatic evaluation protocol.Compared with the strongest baseline scores, it improves Novelty from 0.45 to 0.52, Quality from 0.24 to 0.29, and Feasibility from 0.22 to 0.28.These results suggest that graph-structured evidence helps LLMs generate research ideas through more explicit, compact, and traceable recombination of prior scientific knowledge.
2606.09105.paper_summary_zh: 生成新穎、可行且高品質的研究想法是科學發現中一項重要但具挑戰性的任務。最近基於大型語言模型 (LLM) 的方法通常通過檢索文獻來支持想法生成，但檢索到的證據通常以平面文本的形式提供，例如標題、摘要或總結。這種平面上下文可能包含冗餘或相關性較弱的信息，同時使得在問題、方法、機制和發現之間建立跨論文關係變得困難。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了 Graph2Idea，一個以知識圖譜為指導的檢索增強科學想法生成框架。Graph2Idea 首先根據輸入主題檢索論文，將其轉換為結構化的知識三元組，並動態構建一個以目標為中心的知識圖譜，以使文獻關係變得明確。然後，它提取保持目標相關關係證據的緊湊圖形衍生上下文，同時減少噪聲文本輸入。基於這些上下文，兩階段生成過程首先識別有前景的研究方向，然後引導 LLM 從圖形基礎證據中綜合候選想法。在一個科學想法生成基準上的實驗顯示，Graph2Idea 在自動評估協議下超越了代表性基線。與最強基線分數相比，Novelty 從 0.45 提高到 0.52，Quality 從 0.24 提高到 0.29，Feasibility 從 0.22 提高到 0.28。這些結果表明，圖形結構的證據幫助 LLM 通過更明確、緊湊和可追溯的先前科學知識重組來生成研究想法。
2606.09105.author: Xu Li et.al.
2606.09105.authors: Xu Li, Hanzhe Tu, Xun Han
